title: Display Last Refreshed Timestamp Next to Refresh Button
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see when the report data was last refreshed next to the refresh button, so that I know how current the displayed data is.
description:
Adds a "Last Refreshed: mm/dd/yyyy hh:mm" timestamp in small text to the left of the refresh button on the Reports and Dashboards page. This provides clarity about data freshness, especially when filters are applied and date-based columns like "Last Used" may not be relevant.

The timestamp displays the max modified date from the data set as discussed with the development team.
acceptance_criteria: Last Refreshed timestamp is displayed next to the refresh button
Timestamp updates after clicking the refresh button
Text is small and does not disrupt the existing layout
ux_changes: Added 'Last Refreshed: mm/dd/yyyy hh:mm' text to the left of the refresh button. Uses the max modified date from the dataset.
implementation_notes: Displays the max modified date from the loaded data. No new database field was required.
comment_summary: Balaji confirmed with Waqar to use the max modified date for the timestamp display.
